samples.gvd:
module pulse_detect(
    input clk, input rst_n, input data_in,
    output reg data_out
);
    reg [2:0] state;

    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if(~rst_n) begin
            state <= 3'b000;
            data_out <= 1'b0;
        end
        else begin
            case(state)
                3'b000: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                        state <= 3'b001;
                    end
                    else begin
                        state <= 3'b000;
                    end
                end
                3'b001: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                        state <= 3'b010;
                    end
                    else begin
                        state <= 3'b001;
                    end
                end
                3'b010: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                        state <= 3'b011;
                    end
                    else begin
                        state <= 3'b000;
                    end
                end
                3'b011: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                        state <= 3'b100;
                    end
                    else begin
                        state <= 3'b001;
                    end
                end
                3'b100: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                        state <= 3'b000;
                    end
                    else begin
                        state <= 3'b000;
                    end
                end
                default: begin
                    state <= 3'b000;
                end
        endcase
    end

    end // Auto-repaired
    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if(~rst_n) begin
            data_out <= 1'b0;
        end
        else begin
            if(state == 3'b100 && data_in == 1'b0) begin
                data_out <= 1'b1;
            end
            else begin
                data_out <= 1'b0;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse Detection Module: Detects pulses in a 1-bit input signal data_in and generates a corresponding output signal data_out indicating the presence of pulses.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Implementing pulse detection logic based on the input signal data_in and generating the output signal data_out according to the defined states.</implementation>
</module>
